title: Fruitful
description: An overhaul to apple farming & eating!
body: [![Abnormals Core](https://bit.ly/mcacorebadge)](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/abnormals-core) [![Discord](https://img.shields.io/discord/440256241932173323?label=&color=811111&labelColor=FF2222&logo=Discord&logoColor=811111&style=for-the-badge)](https://discord.gg/VzXSCFp) [![Twitter Follow](https://img.shields.io/twitter/follow/teamauroramods?label=&color=811111&labelColor=FF2222&logo=Twitter&logoColor=811111&style=for-the-badge)](https://twitter.com/teamauroramods) [![All Features](https://img.shields.io/badge/-features-811111?style=for-the-badge)](https://docs.google.com/document/d/e/2PACX-1vRwXX7IsRNYyTVrhcBSY0V38n9gPFKDqFFE5ed0IJwU-LpFJa-24shk3W3SGVgBWZGh34BvE3_qHlpv/pub) An overhaul to apple farming and eating! Fruitful overhauls how apples are gathered and farmed. It also adds baked apples and a new effect to encourage eating them. **Compatible with:** - [Quark](https://modrinth.com/mod/quark) - oak leaf variant leaf carpets & hedges - [Environmental](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/environmental) - apple pies give Sustaining **Full feature list can be found [here](https://docs.google.com/document/d/e/2PACX-1vRwXX7IsRNYyTVrhcBSY0V38n9gPFKDqFFE5ed0IJwU-LpFJa-24shk3W3SGVgBWZGh34BvE3_qHlpv/pub)** **Legacy feature list (1.16.1) can be found [here](https://docs.google.com/document/d/e/2PACX-1vSMxboXEVGpJAGDzOm5BwP15KDrWNbTxkBqIqyKNRKMAZmqYrOeIYtWWGfR9Vdt2H8C1fLiBx4D62-2/pub)** ![divider](https://media.discordapp.net/attachments/272420887121362945/769689391085781022/fruitful.png) [](https://nodecraft.com/r/aurora)
